======= RMA02760Frank H. Golay papers14-10-2760Compiled by M.E. WarrenDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:03:43 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Frank H. Golay papers
Golay, Frank H.
14-10-2760
8 cubic feet. 8 cubic feet.
1955-1983. Topical files, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports. Papers include Golay's topical files concerning chiefly international economic development and relations, and Philippine development, history, and economics. Also, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 6 7 8 ======= 6 7 8 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2460236
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
November 2001
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Economics, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Papers include Golay's topical files concerning chiefly international economic development and relations, and Philippine development, history, and economics. Also, research notes, office files, correspondence, speeches, drafts of articles and other writings, and economic reports.
Cite As:
Frank H. Golay papers, #14-10-2760. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Philippines -- History. Philippines -- Politics and government. Philippines -- Economic conditions. International economic relations. International relations. Economic development projects -- Philippines. Economic development -- Philippines. Developing countries -- Economic conditions.
